top.name: Labyrinth
top.rules_text: Prepare on 4 tiles in a pattern you choose within range 3. Each tile deals 4 damage when entered and pushes the enemy to the next prepared tile in the chain.

channel.name: Labyrinth (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Chain is 6 tiles and also immobilizes at the end

bottom.name: Domain of Silence
bottom.rules_text: Prepare on tile: enemies within 2 tiles cannot cast spells with cost 3 or higher. Lasts 2 turns.

channel.name: Domain of Silence (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Lasts 3 turns and also prevents Channel
